title: Typography
content:
### Font Family Tailwind provides three font family utilities: ```html

Sans-serif font (system UI)

Serif font (Georgia, etc.)

Monospace font (SF Mono, etc.)

``` ### Font Size Scale from `text-xs` (0.75rem) to `text-9xl` (8rem): ```html

Extra small (12px)

Small (14px)

Base (16px) - default

Large (18px)

Extra large (20px)

2xl (24px)

3xl (30px)

4xl (36px)

5xl (48px)

6xl (60px)

7xl (72px)

8xl (96px)

9xl (128px)

``` ### Font Weight ```html

/* 100 */

/* 200 */

/* 300 */

/* 400 */

/* 500 */

/* 600 */

/* 700 */

/* 800 */

/* 900 */ ``` ### Text Color ```html

Gray text

Blue text

Light red text

``` ### Text Alignment ```html

/* text-align: left */

/* text-align: center */

/* text-align: right */

/* text-align: justify */ ``` ### Text Decoration ```html

/* text-decoration: underline */

/* text-decoration: line-through */

/* text-decoration: none */

/* underline with thickness */

``` ### Line Height ```html

/* line-height: 1 */

/* line-height: 1.25 */

/* line-height: 1.5 */

/* line-height: 1.625 */

/* line-height: 2 */

/* line-height: 1.5rem */

/* line-height: 2.5rem */ ``` ### Letter Spacing ```html

/* letter-spacing: -0.05em */

/* letter-spacing: -0.025em */

/* letter-spacing: 0 */

/* letter-spacing: 0.025em */

/* letter-spacing: 0.05em */

/* letter-spacing: 0.1em */ ```
codeExample:
The Art of Typography

Chapter 1: Scale & Proportion

Good typography establishes a clear visual hierarchy. Using heading sizes, font weights, and line spacing creates rhythm and readability.

— Design Principles
